tagline: Optimized for tool-calling and agentic workflows; ~2M token context; shipped with the Agent Tools API.
metaDescription: Grok 4.1 Fast (xAI (Grok)), released 2025-11-19 — part of the Grok Fast line. Optimized for tool-calling and agentic workflows; ~2M token context; shipped with…
overview: Grok 4.1 Fast is a large language model from xAI (Grok), part of the Grok Fast line. Released 2025-11-19. Lower-cost, lower-latency variants of the flagship aimed at high-volume and agentic API use.
What's notable in this version: Optimized for tool-calling and agentic workflows; ~2M token context; shipped with the Agent Tools API. Very low API pricing with cheap cached input.
